message:
Use GitHub App token in node OpenAPI workflow

The workflow was failing because it tried to push directly to main
without the required permissions. Add the app token step matching
the platform OpenAPI workflow.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,8 +12,17 @@ jobs:
     name: Generate
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
+      - name: Generate app token
+        id: app-token
+        uses: actions/create-github-app-token@v1
+        with:
+          app-id: ${{ vars.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_ID }}
+          private-key: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
+
       - name: Checkout
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          token: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}
 
       - name: Generate OpenAPI spec
         run: |
